      Dashboard Sidebar Branding
      Logo and labels displayed in the sidebar navigation visible to all users
      Dashboard
      Organisation Label
      Small uppercase label shown above the title in the sidebar (e.g. your org or client name).
      Sidebar Title
      Main title shown next to the logo in the sidebar.
      Sidebar Subtitle
      Secondary line shown beneath the title.
      Sidebar Logo
      Upload an image or link to one. Shown as a circle in the sidebar.
      📁
      Drag & drop an image, or click to browse
      PNG, JPG, or SVG — automatically resized
      Sign-in Screen Branding
      Logo and labels shown on the login page — the first thing users see
      Sign-in
      Sign-in Title
      Heading shown above the login form.
      Sign-in Subtitle
      Line shown beneath the title on the login page.
      Dzongkha Label
      Dzongkha text displayed on the sign-in card.
      Preview བྱི་ལི་དོམ་གྱི་ ལས་རོགས།
      Sign-in Logo
      Shown in the circle on the login card. Can reuse the sidebar logo.

      Drag & drop an image, or click to browse

      The dashboard sidebar logo will also be used on the sign-in screen.

      Admin contact address for this client — used for notifications and account recovery

      A single admin email address for this client. Saved with the client configuration.

      བྱི་ལི་དོམ་གྱི་ ལས་རོགས།
      Sign-in screen — Shown to all users when they open the dashboard. The Dzongkha label, title, and subtitle appear inside the white card.
      Dashboard Interface
      Layout and behaviour settings for the dashboard view
      Default View
      The default view shown when users open the dashboard.
      Records Per Page
      Number of travel records to display per page in the table.
      Date Format
      Display format for dates across the interface.
      Timezone
      Default timezone for all date/time displays.
      Form & Labels
      Customise field labels and form behaviour
      Travel Purpose Label
      Label shown for the travel purpose field.
      Destination Label
      Label shown for the destination field.
      Official Label
      Label shown for the officiating officer field.
      Enable Dzongkha Labels
      Show Dzongkha translations alongside English labels.
      Module Visibility
      Toggle which modules are available to this client
      Travel Records
      Enable travel record management.
      Calendar View
      Enable calendar visualisation.
      Analytics
      Enable analytics dashboard.
      Staff Management
      Enable staff directory management.
      Security & Access
      Client-specific security policies
      Session Timeout (minutes)
      Auto-logout time for inactive sessions.
      Max Failed Logins
      Lock account after this many failed attempts.
      Require 2FA
      Enforce two-factor authentication.
      Allowed IP Ranges
      Comma-separated CIDR ranges. Leave empty for any IP.
      Integrations
      External service connections for this client
      API Key
      Unique API key for this client. Auto-generated.
      Webhook URL
      Endpoint for real-time event notifications.
      Google Sheets Sync
      Client-specific Google Sheets endpoint.
      Data Region
      Geographic region for client data storage.
      Database Prefix
      Auto-generated database table prefix from Client ID.
      Danger Zone
      Destructive actions for this client
      Reset Client Data
      Clear all records and staff data. Cannot be undone.
      Export Configuration
      Download complete client configuration backup.
